name: Festive Cookies 'n' Mint Pie
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Cookies 'n' Mint Chocolate (HERSHEY'S), broken into pieces and divided
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, combine marshmallows and milk. Microwave at HIGH for 1 minute or until marshmallows are melted and the mixture is smooth when stirred. Let cool completely.
2. Meanwhile, in a small microwave-safe bowl, place half of the candy pieces and 2 tablespoons whipping cream. Microwave at HIGH for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until chocolate is melted when stirred; spread over the bottom of the crumb crust.
3. In a small bowl, beat the remaining whipping cream until stiff. Fold into the marshmallow mixture. Finely chop the remaining candy bar pieces and fold in with food coloring if desired. Spread over the top of the chocolate layer. Cover and refrigerate until firm. Garnish as desired. Store leftover pie in the refrigerator. 6 to 8 servings.
